title: For researchers
text:
Quarto
Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see https://quarto.org.

title: For researchers
text:
Running Code
When you click the Render button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

1 + 1

[1] 2


You can add options to executable code like this


[1] 4


The echo: false option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).

title: faqs
text:
NoneWhat is Quarto?





Quarto is an open-source scientific and technical publishing system built on Pandoc.









NoneWill this match my website theme?





Yes! This uses native Quarto components so it will automatically inherit the colours, fonts and styling of your website.









NoneIs this accessible?





Absolutely. Collapsible callouts use the standard HTML <details> element which is natively supported by all browsers, screen readers and keyboard navigation.









NoneCan I have items open by default?





Yes! Just change collapse="true" to collapse="false" on any item you want to be expanded when the page loads.

text:
